pages.text: Qi Pouch: a storage bag with four times the space of a chest. Opening it costs 10 qi.$(br2)Mystic Bronze Mirror: right-click to spend 50 qi and scan nearby hidden formations, ambient qi, and spirit vein centers for 3 seconds.
$(br)Small Level Up and Big Level Up items add cultivation progress when right-clicked.$(br2)The Debug Stat Editor opens a test GUI for changing player stats during development.
$(br)Magic Ritual Spirit Stones restore qi when used: low grade restores 10 qi, middle grade restores 100 qi, and high grade restores 1000 qi.
